headline: HELOC and home equity loan rates Sunday, June 14, 2026: Truist stays Yahoo's top HELOC lender in June
summary: These are today's HELOC and home equity loan interest rates, Sunday, June 14, 2026. According to Curinos, the average HELOC rate is 7.25%. The national average rate on a home equity loan is 7.86%, which matches the 2026 low first observed in mid-March.

headline: Truist Financial (TFC) Is Up 5.0% After Expanding Grandbridge Master Servicing Platform And Board Strengthening
summary: Earlier this month, Truist Financial expanded its commercial real estate capabilities by launching a rated Master Servicing platform at subsidiary Grandbridge Real Estate Capital, enabling full life-cycle oversight of complex commercial mortgage loans and creating new fee-based servicing income streams. By adding a high-profile risk expert like Catherine Bessant to its board while scaling Grandbridge’s Master Servicing, Truist is pairing governance depth with a broader, recurring-revenue...
